title: AS 4055:2021 Wind Loads for Housing
description: Determine residential wind loading in accordance with AS 4055.

design_code.description: Version. Symbol: Design\;Code. Select version of design code to use for calculations.

wind_region.description: Wind Region. Symbol: Region. Refer to region map in AS4055 Figure 2.1

boundary_distance.description: Boundary Distance. Symbol: Boundary\;Dist. Units: km. In AS 4055:2021, for wind regions C and D, wind class is dependent on the distance from the coast or wind region boundary (Refer to AS 4055:2021 Table 2.2).

terrain_cat.description: Terrain Category. Symbol: TC. Terrain Category to AS 4055 Cl 2.3  TC1: Very exposed open terrain eg. treeless areas, lakes  TC2: Open terrain e.g. farmland with isolated trees  TC2.5: Open terrain with well-scatted obstructions eg. areas with  TC3: Terrain with closely spaced obstructions eg. area with >10 houses per hectare.

shielding.description: Shielding Class. Symbol: Shielding. Shielding class as per AS 4055 Cl 2.5  NS: Less than 2.5 houses per hectare  PS: At least 2.5 houses per hectare (Not valid for topographic class T4 & T5)  FS: At least 10 houses per hectare (Not valid for topographic class T3, T4 & T5).

hill_type.description: Hill Type. Symbol: Hill\;Type. The type of hill structure is located on/near. Refer to AS 4055 Cl 2.4

hill_height.description: Hill Height. Symbol: Height. Units: m. Height of hill.

hill_slope.description: Hill Slope. Symbol: Gradient. Units: °. Maximum slope through the top half of the hill.

hill_zone.description: Hill Zone. Symbol: Hill\;Zone. Specify the zone that structure is located on hill.

structure_type.description: Structure Type. Symbol: Type. Component being loaded.  Note: Main structure is any member not directly supporting cladding.

roof_profile.description: Roof Profile. Symbol: Profile. Profile of roof to be used for calculations.

roof_type.description: Roof Material. Symbol: Material. Material used on roof.

roof_slope.description: Roof Slope (α). Symbol: Roof Slope (α). Units: °. Slope of the roof.

width.description: Width (W). Symbol: Width (W). Units: m. Smallest plan dimension of structure (Max 16m).

length.description: Length (L). Symbol: Length (L). Units: m. Largest plan dimension of structure (Max 5x Width).

height.description: Height (h). Symbol: Height (h). Units: m. Height of structure from average ground to highest point of roof (excluding chimneys)

floors.description: No. of Storeys. Symbol: Storeys. The number of storeys in the structure.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
